# IPTV Americas

> Premium IPTV streaming service offering 54,000+ live TV channels and 120,000+ movies & series in 4K, HD and SD across every device. Instant activation, no contract, and a 30-day money-back guarantee.

IPTV Americas is a subscription IPTV provider. Plans are billed once with no auto-renewal, starting at $7.50/mo. Every plan includes all sports channels, anti-freezing technology, catch-up (up to 4 days), an electronic TV guide (EPG), pay-per-view events, built-in VPN protection, optional adult channels, and 24/7 technical support. The service works on Smart TV, Amazon Firestick, Android, iPhone, iPad, tablets and PC.

## Pricing

- [1 Month](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/pricing/): $16
- [3 Months](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/pricing/): $39
- [6 Months](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/pricing/): $60
- [12 Months](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/pricing/): $90 (best value)

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/): Overview, pricing, features, supported devices, setup guide and FAQ
- [Pricing](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/pricing/): Subscription plans and what every plan includes
- [How It Works](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/#how-it-works): Setup steps after purchase
- [FAQ](https://www.iptv-americas.tv/#faq): Configuration, playlist customization, traveling abroad, and cancellation
